settings.col1_text: Our Polaroid SX-70 & SX-70 Sonar Restoration Service includes a full diagnostic of all mechanical and electronic systems, a comprehensive CLA (cleaning, lubrication, and adjustment), optional re-leathering with brand-new coverings (by request), and a 6-month mechanical warranty on the work performed.
settings.col2_text:
You can upgrade your camera for free to shoot 600 film instead of SX-70. This upgrade is permanent and means you can no longer shoot SX70 film.

In the near future we will have optional board upgrades. These boards will improve the photo quality and let your camera switch between SX70 and 600 film.
settings.col3_text:
Your restoration comes with a 6 month warranty. If anything happens inside our warranty policy within 6 months we will fix it. Warranty does not include shipping or parts.

If your camera repeatedly comes back for warranty we may have to stop repairing it and instead refund your original cost.

View whole policy here

settings.col1_text:
After placing your order you can drop off at our store.

Cameras can be picked up when completed at our storefront. 855 Grand Street, Brooklyn.
settings.col2_text:
If you choose shipping we will email you a label to ship your package.

Your package can be in a box up to 10 x 10 x 6 and 3 pounds.
settings.col3_text:
You can not ship us your camera outside of this label without discussing with our staff first. Any packages sent outside of our prepaid labels or first discussing with us may be lost.

Packages sent to 855 grand street will not be recieved

settings.title: What's a CLA
settings.text: Our Polaroid SX-70 & SX-70 Sonar Restoration Service includes a full diagnostic of all mechanical and electronic systems, a comprehensive CLA (cleaning, lubrication, and adjustment), optional re-leathering with brand-new coverings (by request), and a 6-month mechanical warranty on the work performed.

settings.title: Warranty, Returns, Etc
settings.text:
Our cameras all are available for return within 14 days and a 15% restocking fee.

All SX-70 cameras come with a 6 month warranty from all issues outside of user error.

You can view our FAQ with more info, or our warranty policy

settings.title: Ethos & Transparency
settings.text:
These cameras, while beautiful and timeless, are also notoriously finicky. They require deep technical knowledge, patience, and precision. Every unit that passes through us is treated with care and thorough attention to detail. We aim not only to restore functionality but also to preserve the camera’s beauty.

We are proud of the craftsmanship that goes into our restorations. While no repair can completely eliminate the realities of age or the quirks inherent to decades-old equipment, we hold ourselves accountable to an exceptionally high bar. Our goal is to deliver work that holds up against the toughest industry standards.

settings.title: Shipping & Pickup
settings.text:
You can ship us your camera. If you want your camera shipped back to you, you must choose shipping on the checkout page.

We will email you a label to ship us your camera. Do NOT ship us your camera without using our label.

settings.title: What's a CLA
settings.text:
A CLA (clean, lubricate, adjust) is one of the best ways to keep your camera running smoothly and extend its lifespan. While a CLA sometimes resolves specific issues, its primary purpose is preventative maintenance: restoring your camera to reliable working order and ensuring consistent performance for years to come.

Our CLA service includes –

– light seal replacement to prevent light leaks and protect your film

– lubrication of moving parts including the mirror mechanism and other key areas prone to wear

– shutter magnet evaluation and replacement if needed to ensure accurate and dependable shutter operation

– shutter speed testing and fine-tuning for accuracy across the range

– light meter evaluation and maintenance to check calibration so your exposures remain consistent

During a CLA, our technicians carefully inspect your camera inside and out, cleaning away old lubricants, dust, and residue that can compromise performance. This process often improves the feel of winding and shutter release, reduces the likelihood of jams, and helps protect delicate components from premature wear.

It’s important to note that while a CLA can sometimes fix the specific issue you’re experiencing, its main value is in restoring overall health and reliability. If additional repairs are required, we’ll provide a transparent quote on top of the CLA service.

settings.title: Pricing
settings.text:
Our minimum repair charge is $50. All of our repairs are quote-based, but below are some examples of common repairs and past pricing. Please note that just because you are experiencing a similar issue, it does not guarantee the same price. Many factors — such as parts availability, the extent of damage, and model differences — determine the final cost.

Canon “squeak” repair – $50

Pentax K1000 broken meter – $75

Full CLA on a 1970s Leica Summicron – $125

Broken film winder – $50

settings.title: Ethos & Transparency
settings.text:
Most of our repairs are quote-based, with availability determined by our technicians’ expertise and the availability of necessary parts. In some cases, we may not be able to offer a repair due to various factors. When that happens, there is no charge, and we’ll do our best to suggest alternative options.

Our goal is to make camera repairs fair, affordable, and transparent. Every quote includes clear pricing, and we're always happy to provide guidance on whether a repair is worth pursuing. In some situations, the cost of repair may exceed the value of purchasing a comparable replacement — if that’s the case, we’ll let you know and recommend trusted alternatives.

settings.title: Delivery details
settings.text: Repairs can be delivered back to you by request only. We are not responsible for secure shipping locations and we suggest requesting signature for high value cameras

settings.title: What can you service?
settings.text:
We fully service nearly ALL lenses
We fully service nearly ALL 70s-90s SLR mechanical cameras
We can replace light seals on nearly ANY camera
Part dependent we can do almost any exterior parts replacement
Electrical issues are mostly dependent on models. We are in the process of getting our techs trained to offer full service repairs for TVS series, FUJI GA series, and comparable electrical heavy cameras.
